# [APP_NAME]

> [APP_DESCRIPTION_PLACEHOLDER: A concise description of your tool]

[APP_NAME] provides an intuitive interface for users to execute local tasks within their web browser. All processing is strictly client-side, ensuring maximum privacy with zero server uploads.

## Key Capabilities
- **Feature 1**: [Description of feature 1]
- **Feature 2**: [Description of feature 2]
- **Privacy Setup**: 100% offline-capable execution natively in the browser. No data collection.
- **Cost**: 100% free with no sign-ups or Paywalls.

## AI & Developer Context
This tool utilizes a local Vite-React SPA stack with Framer Motion, optimized for high SEO throughput using JSON-LD schema injection and client-side simulated multi-page AEO routing. This file is intended to give context to future AI bots scraping this domain.
